channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Body of Missing Kisii Man Recovered in Pit Behind School, Police Investigate
item.description: Residents of Nyanturago Market in Kisii County are still shaken after the body of 69-year-old James Iteba Nyangari, who had been missing since March 18, 2026, was discovered in a 25-metre-deep pit beh...

item.title: Punjab Assembly Bill Seeks to Raise Minimum Marriage Age for Christians to 18
item.description: In a historic move aimed at reforming colonial-era legal frameworks, a bill was submitted in the Punjab Assembly's Standing Committee on Minority Affairs on April 9, 2026. This bill proposes raising t...

item.title: UNIJOS Confirms Death of Two Students, Three Injured in Jos Community Attack
item.description: The University of Jos (UNIJOS) don confirm say two of dem students don die and three others don wound as result of recent violent attacks wey happen for Anguwan Kukuba community inside Jos North Local...

item.title: Channels TV Anchor Confronts Ex-ADC Chair Over Unfounded Allegation During Live Interview
item.description: For one Channels Television program, small wahala burst between Kayode OkikiOlu, the anchor for Channels TV, and Ralph Nwosu, wey be former chairman of the African Democratic Congress (ADC). As dem de...

item.title: Conflict Escalates Between Marcus and Felix in Episode 4 of Blood vs Duty
item.description: In Episode 4 of the popular ABS-CBN series 'Blood vs Duty,' tensions reach a boiling point as Marcus finds himself unable to control his emotions, resulting in him physically striking Felix. This dram...

item.title: Federal Campaigns Boost Security Spending Fivefold Amid Rising Threats
item.description: Federal campaign and political action committee spending on security during the 2024 election cycle exceeded five times the amount from the 2016 cycle, according to a report by the Security Project at...

item.title: UK Energy Prices Set to Rise: Iran Conflict Fuels Uncertainty and Supply Concerns
item.description: The UK is facing a challenging outlook for energy bills, with experts predicting a significant increase in prices following the recent conflict involving Iran. A temporary ceasefire has been declared,...

item.title: Two killed, two injured in targeted shooting during high-speed chase in Ormonde
item.description: A violent shooting incident unfolded on Thursday afternoon along Crownwood Road in Ormonde, Johannesburg, when three vehicles engaged in a high-speed chase. The occupants of the vehicles exchanged gun...

item.title: Senator Tulfo Promises Upgrades for Pag-asa Island Residents
item.description: Senator Erwin Tulfo pledged to bring about significant improvements to the living conditions of residents on Pag-asa Island, part of the Kalayaan Island Group in the West Philippine Sea. During the Da...

item.title: Malema Advocates Coalition Between EFF, ANC and MK Party for Future Governance
item.description: EFF leader Julius Malema has outlined his vision for South Africa’s political future, advocating for a coalition involving the EFF, the ANC, and the uMkhonto weSizwe Party (MK Party). At a media brief...

item.title: Tanzania Expands Medical Tourism with Seven Specialized Hospitals
item.description: The Tanzanian government *anakua* (is strengthening) its efforts to promote medical tourism, *na* (and) has partnered with seven hospitals – five public *na* (and) two private – to offer specialized *...

item.title: Chavit Singson Prepared Affidavit Ahead of Senate Flood Control Inquiry Postponement
item.description: Former Ilocos Sur governor Chavit Singson expressed surprise after learning that the Senate Blue Ribbon Committee postponed its scheduled hearing on flood control projects originally set for April 14,...

item.title: Russia defends its naval escort of sanctioned tankers in English Channel
item.description: The Kremlin has said that Russia has the right to defend itself from piracy, after reports emerged that a Russian navy frigate, Admiral Grigorovich, escorted two oil tankers sanctioned by the UK throu...

item.title: Carlton Shows Promise but Struggles to Sustain Performance
item.description: Carlton’s AFL campaign continues to be a story of inconsistency. Despite flashes of brilliance, the Blues fell to Adelaide in the opening match of the fourth Gather Round, highlighting their ongoing s...

item.title: Assam records 84.4% voter turnout in assembly elections, CM calls it historic
item.description: Polling in Assam's 2026 assembly elections concluded with a voter turnout of 84.4%, a significant increase over the previous election's turnout of 82.04%. The election, held in a single phase across 1...

item.title: Wyoming man sentenced to probation for killing wolf after hitting it with snowmobile
item.description: A Wyoming man, Cody Roberts, was sentenced to 18 months of probation after he was found guilty of killing a wolf that he struck with his snowmobile in February 2024. Roberts pursued the animal on his ...

item.title: Ruto to Meet Nairobi MCAs Over County Governance Issues
item.description: President William Ruto is expected to address members of the Nairobi County Assembly (MCAs) to discuss pressing issues surrounding the governance and development agenda of the capital city. The meetin...

item.title: Japan Strengthens Measures to Protect Athletes from Online Abuse
item.description: Japan don begin take serious steps to fight online abuse wey dey target athletes. Athletes all over the world dey face plenty abuse wey fit affect their mental health, performance, and even make some ...

item.title: Pakistan reviews progress in mediating peace between the US and Iran amid ongoing Gulf tensions
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Chief of Defence Forces Field Marshal Asim Munir held a high-level meeting in Islamabad on Thursday to review Pakistan’s ongoing mediatory efforts between the United ...

item.title: Sindh forms committee to implement recommendations from Gul Plaza fire investigation
item.description: The Sindh government has established a high-level committee aimed at ensuring the implementation of the findings and recommendations presented in the judicial inquiry report on the Gul Plaza inferno i...
